message:
bd sync: close Smart Session Handoff epic (caam-6ex0)

Update bead tracker state after completing the Smart Session Handoff
epic, which was the cornerstone P0 feature differentiating caam from
passive dashboard tools.

Completed deliverables:
- SmartRunner with auto-handoff (caam-b6hj)
- PTY controller for command injection (caam-iz4s)
- Provider-specific login handlers (caam-84lq)
- Handoff state machine definitions
- Notification delivery system (caam-suth)
- Unified configuration for handoff settings (caam-a207)
- E2E tests for full handoff flow (caam-7j6d)
- Fallback to manual mode on failure

The epic enables zero-friction continuation when hitting rate limits:
- Rate limit detected in output
- Best backup profile selected automatically
- Auth files swapped atomically
- Login command injected via PTY
- User notified and continues working seamlessly

Target: Sub-5-second handoff time, 90%+ success rate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
